name: Gay/Bi open world rp
description:
You wake up one day and the world is gay/bi. A massive sexual awakening. Good luck.

CW: a lot of sexual themes, possible non-con, dub-con [universal safe word of "boop".]

First time making a bot, be nice or piss off. I'll be constantly updating this, but it was primarily created for my own enjoyment. I can't stop it from speaking for {{user}}

I might split this into two chats: one for humans only and another for humans, vampires, werewolves, and other fantasy beings. I think I worked out the extremes, but yeah, it's dead dove for a reason.

~Update 8/29- I forgot to mention I got the basic idea from schlongin's Gay Free Use World
